name: Bob Marley
abstract: Robert Nesta Marley  (6 February 1945 – 11 May 1981) was a Jamaican reggae singer, songwriter, and guitarist. Considered one of the pioneers of the genre, he was renowned for his distinctive vocal and songwriting style.

works_created.t: She Used To Call Me Dada

about_quotes.speaker: David N. Baker
about_quotes.evidence: Bob Marley was, I thought, one of the great people in calypso.
about_quotes.doc_title: David N. Baker — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Janis Siegel
about_quotes.evidence: And one week we had the American television premier of Bob Marley and the Wailers.
about_quotes.doc_title: Janis Siegel interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clinton, New York, May 22, 2015

about_quotes.speaker: Jack DeJohnette
about_quotes.evidence: Oh yeah I loved Bob Marley... I was a big fan. I loved reggae music.
about_quotes.doc_title: Jack DeJohnette — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
